name: Make the Web AI-Ready
snippet: AgentQL is a suite of tools for connecting your AI to the web. Featuring a query language and parser for interacting with elements and extracting data quickly.

name: AgentQL (@agentql.com) — Bluesky
snippet: @agentql.com integrates with @llamaindex.bsky.social to bring real-time web data to AI agents. Extract structured data, get financial intel, automate web flows.

name: AI-Powered Web Scraping: The Future of Data Extraction - Made By Agents
snippet:
AI is revolutionizing web scraping. Discover cost-effective tools, build a robust scraping dashboard, and solve common data extraction challenges.
Cost Structure: Base tools: Free. Additional costs: LLM costs for AI data extraction and proxy servers (depending on website requirements)

name: AgentQL: How Deepseek & OpenAI Supercharge AI Agents for Web
snippet: This topic on AI Agents is fascinating! Does anyone know if HasData offers a scraper that works with AgentQL for easier web data extraction?

name: Agentql integration - Docs by LangChain
snippet: AgentQL tools provides web interaction and structured data extraction from any web page using an AgentQL query or a Natural Language prompt.
